abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single Grocy AI Assistant configuration is allowed.

user.title: Set up Grocy AI Assistant
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to the Grocy AI Assistant add-on.

init.title: General settings
init.description: Update connection and dashboard polling settings.

debug.title: Debug settings
debug.description: Enable additional integration logging for troubleshooting.

add_product_via_ai.name: Analyze and sync product
add_product_via_ai.description: Analyze a product name with Grocy AI Assistant and sync the result to Grocy.

name.name: Product name
name.description: Product name to analyze. If empty, the integration text entity is used.

sync_product.name: Analyze and sync product
sync_product.description: Analyze a product name with Grocy AI Assistant and sync the result to Grocy.

name.name: Product name
name.description: Product name to analyze. If empty, the integration text entity is used.

notification_emit_event.name: Emit notification event
notification_emit_event.description: Emit an internal notification event for the Grocy AI Assistant rule engine.

event_type.name: Event type
event_type.description: Supported event type, for example item_added or shopping_due.

notification_test_device.name: Send test notification to device
notification_test_device.description: Send a mobile push test notification to one configured target device.

target_id.name: Target ID
target_id.description: Notification target ID, for example notify.mobile_app_pixel_8.

notification_test_all.name: Send test notification to all devices
notification_test_all.description: Send a mobile push test notification to all active target devices.

notification_test_persistent.name: Send persistent test notification
notification_test_persistent.description: Send a test notification using Home Assistant persistent notifications.

barcode_lookup.name: Look up barcode
barcode_lookup.description: Look up a barcode with the Grocy AI Assistant add-on and update the barcode status entity.

scanner_llava_analyze.name: Analyze image
scanner_llava_analyze.description: Analyze a Base64-encoded image with the Grocy AI Assistant image scanner and update the image analysis status entity.

image_base64.name: Image data (Base64)
image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image payload without a file path.

scan_image.name: Analyze image
scan_image.description: Analyze a Base64-encoded image with the Grocy AI Assistant image scanner and update the image analysis status entity.

image_base64.name: Image data (Base64)
image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image payload without a file path.

restart_required.title: Home Assistant restart required
restart_required.description: Grocy AI Assistant requires a Home Assistant restart to apply compatibility changes for this config entry. Impact: synchronization and status updates may remain unreliable until restart. Next steps: restart Home Assistant completely, then verify the "Status" sensor.

addon_unreachable.title: Grocy AI Assistant add-on unreachable
addon_unreachable.description: The Grocy AI Assistant add-on endpoint is currently unreachable for this config entry. Impact: product analysis, barcode lookup, and dashboard data updates cannot run. Next steps: check add-on availability, verify network connectivity, and confirm the API base URL in integration options.

invalid_auth.title: Invalid add-on authentication
invalid_auth.description: Grocy AI Assistant could not authenticate against the add-on. Impact: integration API calls are rejected. Next steps: verify the API key in integration options, update it if needed, and confirm the API base URL points to the correct add-on endpoint.
